headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -101.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 85% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 146 quotes, including 122 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.
• The frustration score of 76.9 sits in the upper half of the 130-day range, showing elevated but not extreme levels.
• Fears improved significantly from yesterday's low while optimism dropped sharply into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
